articles.title: Bangladesh government asks committee to look into 2026 T20 World Cup fiasco
articles.description: The three-man committee will look into all aspects of the decision that led to Bangladesh being removed from the tournament by the ICC

articles.title: Rahul Dravid unveiled as owner of ETPL's Dublin Guardians
articles.description: The league, co-owned by Bollywood star Abhishek Bachchan, features franchises owned by several former and current international cricketers

articles.title: CSA postpones SA squad announcement for Women's T20 World Cup
articles.description: A source close to the situation told ESPNcricinfo the delay has been caused by a "minor internal matter," and not a selection controversy

articles.title: ECB weighs up options for maiden England tour of Nepal
articles.description: Potential for T20I tour to be included in 2027-31 FTP, following T20 World Cup thriller

articles.title: Peake called into Australia's ODI squad, big three absent, Maxwell left out of T20s
articles.description: Peake, Scott, Joel Davies earn maiden call-ups for different parts of the three-leg white-ball tour of Pakistan and Bangladesh with all format quicks rested while Maxwell has missed the T20 squad

articles.title: NZ20 launch pushed back to December 2027 'to succeed over the long term'
articles.description: "This revised timeline gives us the best opportunity to build a world-class competition that New Zealanders can be proud of and that fans deserve"

articles.title: Captain Dean holds her nerve as England edge one-wicket thriller
articles.description: England fielding once again under scrutiny, despite promising trio of debut performances

articles.title: Mehidy five-for hands Bangladesh slim lead despite Awais' debut ton
articles.description: Agha and Rizwan fought back after Pakistan's middle-order collapse, before Bangladesh bagged a 27-run lead

articles.title: New Zealand hit their sweet spot as T20 World Cup defence looms
articles.description: Melie Kerr leads tourists with an eye to the future as injury-hit England get back to business

articles.title: BCCI pulls up IPL teams and owners for misconduct, protocol breaches during the season
articles.description: The advisory said "unauthorised visitors" in hotel rooms posed risks to players getting "compromised" and limited owner interactions with players during a live match

articles.title: England call-up uncapped Alexa Stonehouse for New Zealand ODI series
articles.description: Stonehouse, 21, is yet to represent her nation on the international level but has earned her spot in the side following some outstanding displays for Warwickshire in the Metro Bank One Day Cup.

articles.title: Women's World Cup 2026: Kirstie Gordon returns to Scotland squad
articles.description: Fast-bowling all-rounder Kathryn Bryce captains the 15-member squad.

articles.title: Gus Atkinson suffers concussion against Notts, piles further dilemma for England selectors
articles.description: Atkinson, who has a Test hundred to his name, was struck twice on the head by compatriot Josh Tongue.

articles.title: 'Pretty normal for this time of year - George Bailey downplays concerns surrounding Australia players rejecting central contracts
articles.description: According to reports, five Australian players rejected the central contract offer, with dissatisfaction over the value of the deal and other matters.

articles.title: Not the end of the road for Maxwell, Stoinis, Smith in T20Is: George Bailey
articles.description: Bailey stressed that the experienced trio has “not been dropped”, with the selectors instead aiming to test fresh faces.
